valid_partitions: Bundle A with laptop and eligible mouse
Bundle B with console and exactly two eligible games
multiple bundles eligible and highest discount selected
Bundle A high-price laptop gets 120 discount
Bundle A lower-price laptop gets 80 discount
invalid_partitions: sale item included in bundle discount
console with one game for Bundle B
console with three games for Bundle B
same cart line receives two bundle discounts
bundle discount stacked with coupon BUNDLE-EXTRA
decision_rules: laptop >= 1 and eligible mouse >= 1 and no sale items -> Bundle A eligible
console >= 1 and eligible games = 2 and no sale items -> Bundle B eligible
multiple bundle discounts eligible -> apply highest absolute discount only
laptop unit price >= 4000 -> Bundle A discount 120; else 80
coupon code BUNDLE-EXTRA with bundle discount -> reject stacking
exception_cases: bundle items split across multiple shipments
eligible mouse quantity greater than one
sale flag changes after bundle discount already computed
